title: ジャパンダートダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(I know I'm still missing something... Something
important...)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Oi Racecourse. Dirt. A track so close and yet so
far, like a foreign land.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Dirt Derby. It feels kinda different
from the central races.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Could it be the sweltering heat of summer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The track, the scenery, the turf, and the dirt are
all different too. But even if those are all
different...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I wonder if everyone's feelings stay the same.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was just thinking... each race I've seen has
been something big and special.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The NHK Mile Cup is an important goal for
milers—a highlight of their youth.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen is the stage for Opera O's
and Doto's showdown...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I thought that's why they were so
exciting—because they all just happened to be
special, high-profile turf races.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But... if the runners today hold that same intensity
here at a dirt race, which is different in almost
every way...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Then I think I can say I've grasped the true,
underlying reason why Umamusume are so
special.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Today is my chance to make certain! Together
with the dirt Umas here in Oi!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tonight, in the Derby of dirt racing, she will find
the answer she seeks.
